providers.notes: Phase 12.31: active Comfy image adapter. Route support is resolved through backend-specific route contracts; provider adapters must not inherit routes from another backend.

backend_route_policy.notes: Comfy is the active V2 base image compiler backend; routes still require capability/asset discovery before queueing.

providers.notes: Phase 12.31: future backend adapter. Forge/A1111 must keep independent route contracts and must not borrow Comfy compiler availability.
